arts.ttl: Eintracht Frankfurt vs. RB Leipzig preview: Champions League battle in financial capital
arts.sum: A crucial battle in the Bundesliga’s race for Champions League qualification will unfold on Saturday at Deutsche Bank Park, where third-placed Eintracht Frankfurt host fourth-placed RB Leipzig. The two sides are separated by just three points with only four matches remaining.

arts.ttl: Preview: Eintracht Frankfurt vs. RB Leipzig - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Bundesliga clash between Eintracht Frankfurt and RB Leipzig, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
